findings.description: Both s6 and s7 have identical titles: "プロパティファイルの記述ルール". In the source, these are subsections under the same parent heading split across ロガーファクトリ/ログライタ/ロガー設定 (s6) and FileLogWriter/SynchronousFileLogWriter/BasicLogFormatter (s7). Having duplicate titles makes it ambiguous which section addresses which topic when referenced by an AI agent.
